abilities.name: cud-chew
abilities.shortEffect: Causes the Pokémon to reuse an already consumed Berry at the end of the next turn.
abilities.effect: When the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.
abilities.flavorText: When the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.

abilities.name: armor-tail
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents the opponent from using any moves that have priority, such as Quick Attack.
abilities.effect: The mysterious tail covering the Pokémon’s head makes opponents unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.
abilities.flavorText: The mysterious tail covering the Pokémon's head makes opponents unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.

abilities.name: sap-sipper
abilities.shortEffect: Absorbs Grass moves, raising Attack one stage.
abilities.effect: Whenever a Grass-type move hits this Pokémon, its Attack rises one stage, negating any other effect on it.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Grass-type moves. Instead, its Attack stat is boosted.
